info.name: JunkShop API
info.description:
JunkShop Backend API collection.

**Setup:**
1. Import this collection + `JunkShop-Local.postman_environment.json`
2. Run **Auth → Entity User Login** (demo: KBB / admin) or **Super Admin Login**
3. Tokens are saved automatically to `accessToken`

**Super admin:** entity-scoped routes need `?entityId=` (default `1` = demo Ko Bar Bu).

**Demo credentials:**
- Super admin: `admin@junkshop.local` / `Admin@12345`
- Entity user: entity `KBB`, user `admin` / `Admin@12345`

request.description: Saves accessToken + refreshToken to collection variables.
Demo entity Ko Bar Bu. Main user has all permissions.
